scripts.dev: concurrently -n portal,admin,super -c blue,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:portal" "pnpm dev:admin" "pnpm dev:super-admin"
scripts.shared:build: echo 'Shared is a source-level dep — no build needed'
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @academix/portal build && pnpm --filter @academix/admin build && pnpm --filter @academix/super-admin build
